content.full_text:
February 7, 1990

Richard K. Mason  
Special Counsel  
Los Angeles Unified School District  
Box 3307  
Los Angeles, CA 90051

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. A-90-029

Dear Mr. Mason:

I am writing to confirm our telephone conversation on February 1, 1990 and am enclosing a copy of Regulation 18901, which was recently amended and adopted by the Commission on December 13, 1989.

As we discussed, the Board action summary may be sent by the district office as long as it does not contain the name of any elected school board member. (Regulation 18901(a)(2)(B).)

Furthermore, a board member may attach a "for your information" card containing his or her name to the Board action summary. (Regulation 18901(b)(1).)

I trust this answers your questions.

Sincerely,

Kathryn E. Donovan  
General Counsel

By: Jill R. Stecher  
Counsel, Legal Division

KED:JRS:plh  
Enclosure
